endmodule

endmodule

module add_unsigned_132(A, B, Z);
  input [15:0] A, B;
  output [15:0] Z;
  wire [15:0] A, B;
  wire [15:0] Z;
  wire n_0, n_1, n_3, n_5, n_7, n_9, n_11, n_13;
  wire n_15, n_17, n_19, n_21, n_23, n_25, n_27, n_29;
  XNOR2X1 g686(.A (n_0), .B (n_29), .Y (Z[15]));
  ADDFX1 g687(.A (B[14]), .B (A[14]), .CI (n_27), .CO (n_29), .S
       (Z[14]));
  ADDFX1 g688(.A (B[13]), .B (A[13]), .CI (n_25), .CO (n_27), .S
       (Z[13]));
  ADDFX1 g689(.A (B[12]), .B (A[12]), .CI (n_23), .CO (n_25), .S
       (Z[12]));
  ADDFX1 g690(.A (B[11]), .B (A[11]), .CI (n_21), .CO (n_23), .S
       (Z[11]));
  ADDFX1 g691(.A (B[10]), .B (A[10]), .CI (n_19), .CO (n_21), .S
       (Z[10]));
  ADDFX1 g692(.A (B[9]), .B (A[9]), .CI (n_17), .CO (n_19), .S (Z[9]));
  ADDFX1 g693(.A (B[8]), .B (A[8]), .CI (n_15), .CO (n_17), .S (Z[8]));
  ADDFX1 g694(.A (B[7]), .B (A[7]), .CI (n_13), .CO (n_15), .S (Z[7]));
  ADDFX1 g695(.A (B[6]), .B (A[6]), .CI (n_11), .CO (n_13), .S (Z[6]));
  ADDFX1 g696(.A (B[5]), .B (A[5]), .CI (n_9), .CO (n_11), .S (Z[5]));
  ADDFX1 g697(.A (B[4]), .B (A[4]), .CI (n_7), .CO (n_9), .S (Z[4]));
  ADDFX1 g698(.A (B[3]), .B (A[3]), .CI (n_5), .CO (n_7), .S (Z[3]));
  ADDFX1 g699(.A (B[2]), .B (A[2]), .CI (n_3), .CO (n_5), .S (Z[2]));
  ADDFX1 g700(.A (B[1]), .B (A[1]), .CI (n_1), .CO (n_3), .S (Z[1]));
  ADDHX1 g701(.A (B[0]), .B (A[0]), .CO (n_1), .S (Z[0]));
  XNOR2X1 g702(.A (A[15]), .B (B[15]), .Y (n_0));
endmodule

module ngated(clk, rst_n, A, B, opcode, result, zero_flag,
     overflow_flag);
  input clk, rst_n;
  input [15:0] A, B;
  input [3:0] opcode;
  output [15:0] result;
  output zero_flag, overflow_flag;
  wire clk, rst_n;
  wire [15:0] A, B;
  wire [3:0] opcode;
  wire [15:0] result;
  wire zero_flag, overflow_flag;
  wire [15:0] next_result;
  wire UNCONNECTED, UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z, UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z0,
       UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z1, UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z2, UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z3,
       UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z4, UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z5;
  wire UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z6, UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z7, UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z8,
       UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z9, UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z10, UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z11,
       UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z12, UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z13;
  wire UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z14, UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z15,
       UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z16, UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z17,
       UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z18, UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z19,
       UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z20, UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z21;

       UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z24, UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z25,
       UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z26, UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z27,

module divide_unsigned(A, B, QUOTIENT);
  input [15:0] A, B;
  output [15:0] QUOTIENT;
  wire [15:0] A, B;
  wire [15:0] QUOTIENT;

module add_unsigned_132(A, B, Z);
  input [15:0] A, B;
  output [15:0] Z;
  wire [15:0] A, B;
  wire [15:0] Z;
  wire n_0, n_1, n_3, n_5, n_7, n_9, n_11, n_13;
  wire n_15, n_17, n_19, n_21, n_23, n_25, n_27, n_29;
  XNOR2X1 g686(.A (n_0), .B (n_29), .Y (Z[15]));
  ADDFX1 g687(.A (B[14]), .B (A[14]), .CI (n_27), .CO (n_29), .S
       (Z[14]));
  ADDFX1 g688(.A (B[13]), .B (A[13]), .CI (n_25), .CO (n_27), .S
       (Z[13]));
  ADDFX1 g689(.A (B[12]), .B (A[12]), .CI (n_23), .CO (n_25), .S
       (Z[12]));
  ADDFX1 g690(.A (B[11]), .B (A[11]), .CI (n_21), .CO (n_23), .S
       (Z[11]));
  ADDFX1 g691(.A (B[10]), .B (A[10]), .CI (n_19), .CO (n_21), .S
       (Z[10]));
  ADDFX1 g692(.A (B[9]), .B (A[9]), .CI (n_17), .CO (n_19), .S (Z[9]));
  ADDFX1 g693(.A (B[8]), .B (A[8]), .CI (n_15), .CO (n_17), .S (Z[8]));
  ADDFX1 g694(.A (B[7]), .B (A[7]), .CI (n_13), .CO (n_15), .S (Z[7]));
  ADDFX1 g695(.A (B[6]), .B (A[6]), .CI (n_11), .CO (n_13), .S (Z[6]));
  ADDFX1 g696(.A (B[5]), .B (A[5]), .CI (n_9), .CO (n_11), .S (Z[5]));
  ADDFX1 g697(.A (B[4]), .B (A[4]), .CI (n_7), .CO (n_9), .S (Z[4]));
  ADDFX1 g698(.A (B[3]), .B (A[3]), .CI (n_5), .CO (n_7), .S (Z[3]));
  ADDFX1 g699(.A (B[2]), .B (A[2]), .CI (n_3), .CO (n_5), .S (Z[2]));
  ADDFX1 g700(.A (B[1]), .B (A[1]), .CI (n_1), .CO (n_3), .S (Z[1]));
  ADDHX1 g701(.A (B[0]), .B (A[0]), .CO (n_1), .S (Z[0]));
  XNOR2X1 g702(.A (A[15]), .B (B[15]), .Y (n_0));
endmodule

module ngated(clk, rst_n, A, B, opcode, result, zero_flag,
     overflow_flag);
  input clk, rst_n;
  input [15:0] A, B;
  input [3:0] opcode;
  output [15:0] result;
  output zero_flag, overflow_flag;
  wire clk, rst_n;
  wire [15:0] A, B;
  wire [3:0] opcode;
  wire [15:0] result;
  wire zero_flag, overflow_flag;
  wire [15:0] next_result;
  wire UNCONNECTED, UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z, UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z0,
       UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z1, UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z2, UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z3,
       UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z4, UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z5;
  wire UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z6, UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z7, UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z8,
       UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z9, UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z10, UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z11,
       UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z12, UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z13;
  wire UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z14, UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z15,
       UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z16, UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z17,
       UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z18, UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z19,
       UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z20, UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z21;
  wire UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z22, UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z23,
       UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z24, UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z25,
       UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z26, UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z27,
       UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z28, UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z29;
  wire UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z30, UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z31,
       UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z32, UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z33,
       UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z34, UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z35,
       UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z36, UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z37;
  wire UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z38, UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z39,
       UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z40, UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z41,
       UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z42, UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z43,
       UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z44, UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z45;
  wire UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z46, UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z47,
       UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z48, UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z49,
       UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z50, UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z51,
       UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z52, UNCONNECTED_HIER_Z53;
